description: AI Prompt Templates Collection - Top 10 per category

items.name: Upbeat Dance Pop
items.prompt: Infectious pop anthem, female powerhouse vocals, pulsing 808 bass, synth-wave layers, euphoric build-ups, radio-ready polish, modern production, vocal harmonies on chorus

items.name: Emotional Pop Ballad
items.prompt: Piano-driven ballad, raw emotional vocals, subtle string arrangements, builds from intimate verse to soaring chorus, modern radio production, reverb on vocals

items.name: Indie Pop Vibe
items.prompt: Jangly indie-pop, warm lo-fi aesthetic, vintage synths, organic drums, bedroom recording charm, catchy but not over-produced, tape saturation warmth

items.name: Stadium Rock Anthem
items.prompt: Massive power chords, arena rock production, anthemic chorus, driving rhythm section, guitar solo, crowd-ready hooks, distorted guitars, thunderous drums

items.name: Grunge Revival
items.prompt: Fuzzy distorted guitars, 90s grunge aesthetic, raw anguished vocals, dynamic quiet-loud structure, analog tape grit, genuine angst

items.name: Modern Trap Banger
items.prompt: Hard-hitting 808s, menacing trap beat, rapid hi-hat rolls, atmospheric pads, dark melodic undertones, confident rap flow, ad-libs

items.name: Chill Boom Bap
items.prompt: Classic boom bap drums, vinyl crackle, jazzy piano samples, laid-back smooth flow, storytelling rap, 90s hip-hop nostalgia

items.name: Modern Country Pop
items.prompt: Twangy steel guitar, modern pop production, catchy hooks, warm heartfelt vocals, banjo accents, uplifting chorus

items.name: Outlaw Country Ballad
items.prompt: Raw acoustic guitar, whiskey-soaked vocals, harmonica, honest storytelling, outlaw country grit, minimal production

items.name: Festival Main Stage Banger
items.prompt: Massive synth drops, festival-ready energy, pulsing sub-bass, euphoric builds, sidechain compression, crowd-hyping elements, laser synths

video.name: Video Generation
video.description: Prompts for Sora, Kling, Veo, Runway

items.name: Cinematic Wide Shot
items.prompt: Cinematic short film, wide establishing shot, slow dolly-in, subject walking in environment, golden hour lighting, sunset atmosphere

items.name: Sora Multi-Shot Template
items.prompt: Scaffolded multi-shot template with scene headlines and beat timing. Shot 1 (0-5s): wide angle + action. Shot 2 (5-10s): medium close-up + action continuation. Physics notes: global rules.

items.name: Kling Timeline Script
items.prompt: Cinematic 16:9, visual style: modern. Beat 0-4s: camera angle + scene. Beat 4-8s: camera change + action. Beat 8-10s: final shot. Audio: ambient sound, SFX synchronized.

items.name: Veo 3 Structured
items.prompt: Project: Cinematic Commercial. Aspect ratio: 16:9. Camera: Alexa Mini LF. Lens: Anamorphic 35mm. Shot: Medium close-up. Movement: Slow dolly in. Lighting: Softbox 45° right.

items.name: Sora Full Template
items.prompt: Plain language scene description with characters, costumes, scenery. Cinematography: camera shot + framing. Mood: overall tonal intent. Actions: beat-by-beat action with timing. Dialogue: character-specific lines.

items.name: Ultra-Detailed Production
items.prompt: Format: emulated film stock, grain level, shutter angle. Lens: focal length + anamorphic ratio. Color grade with specific palette. Lighting: key source + bounce + negative fill. Shot breakdown with durations.

items.name: Hybrid Workflow
items.prompt: Step 1: Keyframe generation with Midjourney. Step 2: Motion synthesis with Veo. Step 3: Dialogue sync with Kling. Step 4: Upscaling to 4K.

items.name: Audio-First Music Video
items.prompt: Generate audio in Suno. Export beat timestamps. Map timeline beats to audio in Kling. Enable lip-sync mode with character reference.

items.name: Model Selection Guide
items.prompt: Runway: commercials, VFX, physics. Kling: music videos, dialogue. Veo: brand series, automation. Sora: physics simulation, fluid dynamics.

items.name: Common Fixes
items.prompt: Problem solving: inconsistent style = use style reference. Quality degradation = regenerate from upscaled. Motion blur = crisp motion. Morphing = remains solid throughout.

image.name: Image Generation
image.description: Prompts for Midjourney, DALL-E, Stable Diffusion

items.name: UI Mockup

items.name: Epic Landscape

items.name: Food Photography
items.prompt: Professional food photography, natural light, top-down angle, clean composition, appetizing colors,美食摄影, editorial style

items.name: Fashion Editorial
items.prompt: Fashion editorial, high fashion, Vogue style, dramatic lighting, editorial composition, professional model, magazine quality
